creator: dch@freebsd.org

Crash Annotation GraphicsCriticalError: |[C0][GFX1-]: CompositorBridgeChild receives IPC close with reason=AbnormalShutdown (t=0.413256) Exiting due to channel error.

fish: Job 1, 'firefox --profile $(mktemp -d -…' terminated by signal SIGSEGV (Address boundary error)

I'll report this upstream.

firefox: from pkg, 118.0.2
